note: High-water mark for /sync-upstream. This repo's .claude harness was bootstrapped on 2026-06-13 from the upstream template repo (telecom/3GPP) and retargeted to LLM/AI surveys. On 2026-06-27 the full config backlog (7c3a3bf..5d485d7, 314 commits) was synced and re-adapted in 5 reviewable batches; this SHA is the upstream HEAD synced through 2026-06-27. The next /sync-upstream diffs <last_synced_commit>..HEAD for config paths only, re-adapts each delta to the LLM/AI domain, then advances this marker. See the claude-infra-ported-from-data-channel-receiver memory.
